info.title: Little Green Light CRM API
info.description: Complete, 141-endpoint REST API connector for the Little Green Light donor database. Exposes all core resources, sub-resources, campaigns, fundraising, activities, and customization tools.

api_key.name: access_token
api_key.description: Enter your raw Little Green Light API Key generated in Settings > Integration > API Keys.
